gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(T3.superhero_name) FROM hero_attribute AS T1 INNER JOIN attribute AS T2 ON T1.attribute_id = T2.id INNER JOIN superhero AS T3 ON T1.hero_id = T3.id WHERE T2.attribute_name = 'Speed' AND T1.attribute_value = 100
pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(T3.superhero_name) FROM superhero AS T3 JOIN hero_attribute AS T2 ON T3.id = T2.hero_id JOIN attribute AS T1 ON T2.attribute_id = T1.id WHERE T1.attribute_name = 'Speed' AND T2.attribute_value = 100;
question: Count the fastest superheroes.
